questionHtml: In 2017, two neutron stars were observed to merge, forming a black hole. The material released included chemical elements produced by the r process of neutron capture. Describe two characteristics of the elements produced by the r process.
markschemeHtml:
higher atomic number than iron ✓

excess of neutrons ✓

radioactive/undergoing beta decay ✓

 

Allow heavier than iron for MP1
